appraisal_events.evidence: Bloch « se figurait que duchesse de Guermantes avait parlé sincèrement » et « continua, au grand désespoir de Norpois, à lui poser nombre de questions ».
appraisal_events.explanation: Bloch fails to recognize the irony of the duchess and heavily insists with his questions, provoking Norpois' despair; this presents him as socially awkward and inappropriate.

status_effects.explanation: He is locally depreciated for his social clumsiness and unwelcome insistence.
